findings.description: Knowledge file introduces the fully qualified class name `nablarch.common.permission.PermissionUtil`, but the source file only refers to `PermissionUtil` without specifying the package.
findings.source_evidence: Source code comment: `// PermissionUtilからPermissionを取得する` and `Permission permission = PermissionUtil.getPermission();` — no package prefix given anywhere in the source.

findings.description: `Initializable` interface name is mentioned in the s1 section content ("Initializableインタフェースを実装している") but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "BasicPermissionFactoryクラスは初期化が必要なため、:ref:`repository_initialize` に記述したInitializableインタフェースを実装している。"
